---
title: "Changelog"
toc: true
listing:
  filter-ui: true
  type: table
  contents:
    - "changelog/**/*.md"
  sort: "filename desc"
  feed: true
  fields: [title]
---

All notable changes are documented here. Format based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/).

**Added** — new features. **Changed** — changes in existing functionality. **Fixed** — bug fixes. **Removed** — removed features.
